ABOUT.

2+ YRS EXP

Rahul R

Software Engineer

Bengaluru, India
Feb 2024 – Present
B.E – CSE | CGPA 8.9
AZ-900 (In Progress)

Engineer with 2+ years of experience at Siemens Healthineers spanning full-stack internal tooling, automation testing, and DevOps practices. I started as an Automation Test Engineer in February 2024, working on enterprise-level application automation using Java, Selenium, and Azure DevOps.

I identified operational challenges within the organization's Azure DevOps environment and independently designed a MERN stack application for centralized pipeline management — now serving 100+ daily users across multiple teams. The platform manages 30+ pipelines and significantly improved operational efficiency.

My long-term focus is aligned toward DevOps Engineering, Cloud Technologies, Infrastructure Automation, and scalable deployment architecture. I'm continuously strengthening expertise in Docker, Kubernetes, Azure Cloud, CI/CD pipelines, and Linux systems.

EXPERIENCE.

Software Engineer

Siemens Healthineers · Bengaluru

Feb 2024 – Present

Built a centralized MERN stack pipeline management platform used by 100+ daily users, enabling execution, scheduling, monitoring, and PDF report downloads — replacing direct Azure DevOps portal access.

MERNAzure DevOpsPlatform

Implemented YAML-based CI/CD pipelines in Azure DevOps covering build, test, and release stages; reduced manual deployment effort by ~80%.

CI/CDYAMLAzure

Automated 150+ regression and smoke test cases for complex CPQ modules using Java and Selenium; integrated test suites into pipelines for continuous execution.

JavaSeleniumAutomation

Developed automation analytics dashboards comparing manual vs automated effort, helping teams track productivity improvements and time savings.

AnalyticsReactDashboard

Designed cloud hosting architecture for the internal platform, including infrastructure planning and Azure deployment strategy.

Pipeline Management Platform

100+ daily users30+ pipelines managed~90% effort reduction

Identified a major operational challenge where multiple projects shared the same Azure DevOps instance, causing usability issues. Built an end-to-end MERN stack solution that enabled users to execute pipelines, schedule runs, monitor results, download PDF reports, and view analytics from a centralized interface.
